title: Component System
description: Build a complete card component system with variants, states, and responsive behavior using modern CSS techniques
html:
NEW

Elevated Card

This card has an elevated shadow and a badge.

Outlined Card

This card uses a border instead of shadow.

validationRules.message: Secondary button should be light gray

hints.text: BEM naming: Block (sys-card), Element (sys-card__header), Modifier (sys-card--elevated). Keep selectors flat with single class names.
Base .sys-card gets shared styles. --elevated adds box-shadow. --outlined adds border. __btn--primary is blue, __btn--secondary is gray.
Build the component layer by layer: base card, variants, elements, and button modifiers.
